failures.description: The agent incorrectly interpreted the ProductCatalogSearch result and answered with item 1507389580 at $1157.86 instead of the actual cheapest item, 5339029584 at $1128.99.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to identify the cheapest available Smartphone. The correct tool call was made and returned two available smartphones sorted by ascending price: item 5339029584 at $1128.99 and item 1507389580 at $1157.86. At step 4, the Executor synthesized the answer but selected the more expensive second item as the cheapest, contradicting the tool output. This is not an invocation error or unsupported intent; the relevant evidence was available and was misread.
